caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Lombok dependency version to a newer release compatible with the target environment.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and is incompatible with Spring Boot 2.x APIs; keeping version 2.4.2 would cause dependency conflicts and prevent usage of Spring Boot 3 features required for modern JDK support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would continue to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility checks.
